abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Fury of the Faithful
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that targeted this model and caused it to remove a Shielded token, deal 1 damage to the attacker.

abilities.name: Run and Gun
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate (missile) actions instead of (melee) actions.

actions.name: Death-Touched Crossbow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives +1(c) to its Skl if the target is at a lower elevation.

triggers.name: Coordinated Defense
triggers.text: An ally engaged with the target gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Ignite Pyre
triggers.text: Remove a Burning token from the target. Make a Pyre marker within 1" of the target.

triggers.name: Exorcism
triggers.text: Target must have a Summon token. Kill the target.

actions.name: Roll Aside
actions.effects: This model may move up to 3" and declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Light the Pyre
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Make a Pyre marker in base contact with the target. If the target is an enemy marker, gain a Shielded token. Then, remove the target.
